name: Flying Solo
desc: Solo musical competition. There are two categories- vocal and instrumental. Participants can have one entry per category only. Refer to rulebook for judging criteria and subsequent rounds.

rounds.name: Flying Solo
rounds.desc: A solo music competition divided into Vocal and Instrumental categories, featuring online preliminaries and live stage finals.

name: Oxford Style DEBATE
desc: An Oxford Style Debate will be conducted. There will be two teams comprising the motion. One team Proposes the motion , the other team opposes it . The Proposition Team will get total 4 minutes in Opening Speech portion ( 2mins per member) followed by the rebuttal. The same process applies for the Opposition Team . In 1st round , total 12 teams will be made to participate ( max 20 )  , then in the finals 6 teams will qualify out of whom winners will be decided.

rounds.name: Prelims Round
rounds.desc: The Prelims Round will Consist of 12 Teams ( 6 Proposition- Opposition Pairs ) or ( Max 20 Teams - 10 from Proposition 10 from Opposition ) . Now 4 mins will be alloted to each team ( 2min/member) followed by the Rebuttal ( 2min ) in total . Then on basis of performance evaluation , total 6 Teams will be qualified to The Finals .

name: Dumb Charades
desc: Small event about the good old dumb charades, where one person reenacts something, and the others try to guess what it is.

rounds.name: Dumb Charades
rounds.desc: A knockout-style game for teams, they must guess movie or TV series names from chits within a time limit.

rounds.name: Dumb Charades
rounds.desc: A knockout-style game for teams, they must guess movie or TV series names from chits within a time limit.

name: Mono Act
desc: A solo performance event where a single participant brings a story or character to life through expressive acting and powerful dialogue. With just expression, voice, and presence, a single actor holds the audience spellbound and turns a simple act into a powerful story.

rounds.name: Mono Act
rounds.desc: A solo acting competition where participants perform an original or adapted act of under 3 minutes in Hindi, Bengali, or English.

name: Rang Manch
desc:
The lights hum softly. A hush settles in. A voice rises — and suddenly, the world shifts. A room becomes a courtroom. A garden becomes a battlefield of dreams. Emotions thicken, tensions rise, and the ordinary dissolves into something extraordinary.

This is Rangmanch — the heartbeat of theatre by LES THESPIANS, where stories aren’t just performed, they are lived. A celebration of bold storytelling and powerful expression, this year it brings two compelling worlds to life — one in Hindi and one in Bengali — each ready to move and mesmerize.

The Two Acts :

Khamosh Adalat Jari Hai
From the bold imagination of Vijay Tendulkar, what begins as a light-hearted courtroom game slowly tightens into something far more unsettling. Smiles fade, questions sharpen, and the air grows heavy — leaving you to wonder who is really on trial.

Sajano Bagan
Written by the acclaimed Manoj Mitra, this moving drama unveils fragile dreams and unspoken desires, revealing how carefully arranged lives can conceal deep emotional storms.

rounds.name: Rang Manch
rounds.desc: A theatrical showcase featuring two plays (one in Hindi and one in Bengali).

name: Footloose
desc: A knockout-style street dance battle for teams of 4 to 8 dancers, featuring styles like Hip-Hop, Popping, and B-Boying.

rounds.name: Footloose
rounds.desc: A knockout-style street dance battle for teams of 4 to 8 dancers, featuring styles like Hip-Hop, Popping, and B-Boying.

name: Rockbuzz
desc: It is a band competition where participating bands have to showcase their performances in the preliminary round by submission of their entry through the website. Bands who qualify will get to perform on the live stage of REBECA 85 for the Finals Round.

rounds.name: Preliminary Round.
rounds.desc: The bands will register and submit their entries through the website. Only one entry per band is allowed.

rounds.name: Final Round.
rounds.desc: The bands who qualify the Preliminary Round will be invited to perform live on the stage of REBECA 85 on Day 3 Kolkata Night between 18:00 to 22:00 for the Finals Round.

name: Verse Wars
desc: A poetry slam for you to take your rhyme to the next level. Use your verses, your voice and let the crowd lose themselves to the power of your words.

rounds.name: Verse Wars
rounds.desc: The Event consists of a single round in which participants have to recite their original literary work either from memory or from page in any style of their choice in English, Hindi or Bangla. The Event will be held at Institute Hall on Day 4 (22.03.2026) from 14:00 to 16:00 hours.

name: Rebequiz
desc: A trivia competition for teams, featuring questions based on the MELAS theme (Music, Entertainment, Literature, Arts, and Sports)

name: Fiducia
desc: Fiducia is a dynamic theme-based fashion show that celebrates confidence, style, and individuality. Participants take the stage to present their walk, expressions, and personality, turning fashion into a powerful form of self-expression.

rounds.name: Fiducia
rounds.desc: Step into the spotlight, own the runway, and let your style do the talking in Fiducia, a glamorous ramp walk and fashion showdown.

name: Pixel Poetry
desc: Pixel Poetry is a photography competition that celebrates creativity through the lens. Participants will capture powerful moments based on a given theme and showcase their storytelling through photographs. The event challenges photographers to blend art, perspective, and emotion into a single frame. 📸✨

rounds.name: Online Submission
rounds.desc:
o Participants must submit their best photograph based on the given theme.
o Submission deadline 17th March ,2026 .
o Entries will be judged based on creativity, composition, and adherence to theme.

rounds.name: Finals
rounds.desc:
o Selected participants from Round 1 will compete in an on-campus photography challenge.
o A theme will be given on the spot, and participants will have a set time limit to capture and submit their photos. 
o Editing will be allowed only within the permitted software/tools.

name: Rebecsal
desc: 7-side Football Knockout Tournament.

rounds.name: Rebecsal
rounds.desc: 7-side football knockout match as per tournament bracket. Other information attached in the rulebook.

name: Reel on Rebeca
desc: Camerabuff, the Film Society of IIEST Shibpur, presents the “Reel on REBECA” competition as part of REBECA 2026. This event invites students to showcase their creativity through short-form reel videos. Capture the energy, emotions, and unforgettable moments of REBECA. Highlight performances, behind-the-scenes fun, and the vibrant fest spirit. Turn your vision into a cinematic story and let your lens speak. 🎬✨

rounds.name: Reel Submission
rounds.desc: Participants must create and submit a short-form reel capturing the spirit of REBECA. The competition starts on Thursday and submissions close on Sunday.

name: Rescenic
desc: Rescenic is a Movie Scene Recreation event organized by Camerabuff, where participants recreate iconic scenes from films with their own creative interpretation. Teams will bring cinematic moments to life through acting, direction, and presentation.

rounds.name: Movie Scene Recreation
rounds.desc: Teams will recreate a selected movie scene and present it before the judges. Creativity, acting, and fidelity to the original scene will be considered in the evaluation.

name: Typist Tourney
desc: Get ready to compete in an electrifying offline keyboard typing speed test hosted on the MonkeyType platform. Race against time to achieve the fastest and most accurate typing score. Whether you’re a seasoned typist or just looking for a fun challenge, this event promises an adrenaline-fueled experience. Sharpen your reflexes, unleash your speed, and claim the title of the fastest typist!

rounds.name: Qualifiers
rounds.desc: Qualifier round for Typist Tourney Finals. Participants will compete in a typing speed challenge on the MonkeyType platform.

rounds.name: Finals
rounds.desc: Top 10 finalists from Round 1 will compete in the final typing speed challenge to determine the fastest typist.

name: WhatIf - Poster Re-Designing Contest
desc: Camerabuff – The Film Society of IIEST Shibpur presents “What If” — a creative poster redesign challenge where nostalgia meets modern artistry. Reimagine any retro film (any language) with a bold, contemporary twist. Keep its soul, change the vibe, and redefine its look. Let your creativity rewrite cinematic history.

rounds.name: Poster Submission
rounds.desc: Participants must register through the official REBECA website and complete the payment. The WhatsApp group link will be shared and participants will be added for further updates. Participants must redesign a poster of any retro film (any language) in a modern style while retaining its core essence. Only one original entry is allowed (AI strictly prohibited). The submission must be in JPEG/PNG format with a 4:5 ratio along with the editable design link via the provided Google Form.

name: Photowalk
desc: Photowalk is a casual photography activity organized by Catharsis where participants will visit a location together and capture photographs, mainly focusing on street photography. This is not a competition but an opportunity for photography enthusiasts to explore, practice, and enjoy capturing moments.

rounds.name: Photowalk
rounds.desc: Participants will gather and visit a selected location to capture photographs, primarily focusing on street photography. This is not a competitive event.

name: Photography Workshop
desc: It will be a photography workshop organized by Catharsis where participants can learn photography techniques and interact with the artist. The session will focus on improving practical skills, understanding composition, and exploring creative photography approaches.

rounds.name: Workshop Session
rounds.desc: It will be a photography workshop consisting of the audience and the artist, focusing on learning photography techniques and interaction.

name: Saturnalia
desc: Saturnalia is a photography exhibition organized by Catharsis where selected photographs from participants will be showcased in a curated exhibition format. Participants can submit their best captures, and selected photographs will be printed and displayed in framed format during the exhibition.

rounds.name: Photography Exhibition
rounds.desc: Display of selected photographs in printed frames. Participants can submit their best captures for selection. Selected photographs will be printed and displayed in an exhibition format. Submission deadline: 18 March 2026.

name: Shutter Sprint
desc: Shutter Sprint is a photography challenge organized by Catharsis - The Photography Society of IIEST, Shibpur. Participants will receive blurred photos one by one and must guess where the photograph was taken. Teams must then go to that location, recreate the same frame from the same perspective, and submit the photo to the organizer along with a selfie of the entire group at that spot.

rounds.name: Shutter Sprint Challenge
rounds.desc: Participants will be given blurred photographs and must identify the location, recreate the same frame from the same perspective, and submit the photo along with a group selfie at the spot.
